name: Hyperspace
title: Hyperspace by HTML5 UP
description: Dark-themed single-page template with a fixed left sidebar navigation. Left sidebar is a narrow vertical panel with a nav menu listing 4 sections (Welcome, Who we are, What we do, Get in touch). Main content scrolls vertically through sections: Intro section has a large heading ('Hyperspace'), subtitle paragraph, and 'Learn more' button with fade-up animation. 'Who we are' section contains 3 spotlight rows — each pairs a left-side image with right-side content (heading, description, 'Learn more' button). 'What we do' section has a heading, paragraph, and a 2x3 grid of 6 feature cards — each with a large Font Awesome icon (code, lock, cog, desktop, link, gem), heading, and description. 'Get in touch' section splits into two columns: left has a contact form (name, email, message, 'Send Message' button); right has contact details (address, email, phone) and social icon links (Twitter, Facebook, GitHub, Instagram, LinkedIn). Footer with copyright. Deep purple/violet color scheme with gradient accents.

typography.style: Bold uppercase headings with wide letter-spacing. Light body text. Clean sans-serif throughout. Strong typographic hierarchy.

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar (narrow) with scrollable main content area. Sidebar uses position:fixed. Main content sections are full-width. Spotlight sections use 50/50 image-text split. Feature grid uses 2x3 flexbox layout. Contact section uses 50/50 split. Responsive: sidebar becomes top bar on mobile.
visualStyle: Dark, atmospheric, futuristic. Deep purple background with magenta and violet gradient accents. Fixed sidebar creates a dashboard-like feel. Fade-up animations on scroll. Bold color scheme suggests tech/creative industry.

name: Beauty
title: Beauty HTML5 Template
description: Artistic beauty/lifestyle template with geometric clip-path shapes and elegant pink palette. Top decorative bar (30px, #CC9999). Welcome section: left panel (84%) on warm beige (#CEC0AE) with circular logo (370px), crown/heart icons, heading, description, Continue link; right panel (16%) white skewed parallelogram. Clip-path parallelogram sections: one with 2 side-by-side background images and pink text panel; another reversed with users icon and background image. Community section with centered dark heading on white. Image gallery with Slick carousel (4 images, responsive) with hover caption overlay. Contact with circular clip-path pink panel (tel/fax/email) and form with underline inputs and circular Send button. Footer with copyright.

typography.style: Light elegant sans-serif with generous spacing

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 4 grid, clip-path polygon shapes for sections, max-width 925px top bar, flexbox layouts
visualStyle: Artistic beauty template with geometric clip-path shapes and dusty pink/beige palette

name: Space Dynamic
title: Space Dynamic - SEO HTML5 Template
description: Modern SEO and digital marketing agency single-page template with a bold hero section featuring left-aligned heading, subtitle, and a website URL analysis form alongside a right-side illustration. Below the hero, an About section pairs a character illustration with a 2x2 grid of icon-based service cards (Data Analysis, Reporting, Analytics, SEO). A Services section displays animated skill progress bars. Portfolio section uses isotope-style masonry grid with category filter tabs. Blog section shows post cards with thumbnail images. Contact section includes a full-width form. Preloader with animated dots. WOW.js scroll-triggered fade animations throughout.

typography.style: Clean modern sans-serif with medium weight headings

layoutDetails: Full-width single-page layout with Bootstrap 5 grid. Hero uses two-column split. Services with progress bars. Portfolio uses isotope masonry grid with filter tabs.
visualStyle: Clean, modern, corporate. Flat design with subtle shadows. Blue accent with red CTA buttons. Illustrated graphics. Animated entrance effects on scroll.

name: Mochi Space
title: Mochi Space - Your Cozy Self-Care Companion
description: Kawaii self-care app landing page with pastel colors and playful character mascot. Hero features a CSS-drawn Mochi character with animated eyes and blush, alongside a phone mockup showing mood-tracking app with real-time clock, emoji mood buttons, and breathing exercise card. Features section with illustrated screenshot cards. How-it-works with numbered steps. Testimonials with star ratings. Download CTA. Floating pastel background shapes. Rounded, bubbly design language with Nunito and Comfortaa fonts.

typography.style: Rounded, friendly fonts with warm brown text on cream background.

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling with centered content. Hero with two-column layout (text + phone mockup). Features in alternating card grid. Floating pastel shapes as fixed background.
visualStyle: Kawaii/cute aesthetic with pastel colors, CSS-drawn mascot, phone mockup, floating shapes, and bubbly rounded elements.
